rows.notes: P84 starts only after the landed green P83 promotion handoff.
The keep-set closeout should be authored from the clean p83 promotion-ready branch.
Only the required mounted keep set plus quarantined dirty survivors should remain mounted.
The temporary p81 and p82 worktrees should be removed while preserving branch lineage.
README/router/registry/handoff docs should all point at the P84/P83 closeout state.
